textByHash.01f6a705de63af86592273bf3dad9e02fffbe324: Okay, never mind. Maybe next time...
textByHash.0a45007b24d830e9d17a081c490844758cd7d564: You can pass to the green winger gnomes. Then you can make a run and they'll pass back. Otherwise, if you're feeling brave, you can just charge and dodge.
textByHash.1a8d1d43f8bb702e16283b6cf409e39c7f2adea6: You have a ball in play. Do you need to hear the rules again?
textByHash.27082a89742258210a7a5acf76a3cb98df7aad0b: The ball you have in your hand is fine to play with... Game on.
textByHash.2ba3fa01f7b19ac0b94e945a7cc6928e5bc24315: Please enter the answer to the question.
textByHash.3c1745b25cf0610c96826bb879cbb4bcffa3c8b0: Hi, welcome back to Gnomeball. Would you like to hear the rules again?
textByHash.4f82ec8dd8832d1d92d685b024cbd3de4a982ba1: The main aim is to leave with no broken limbs. I think you should be fine.
textByHash.54769fecdc4ae4dc5af1fe85abf184a52dbc555f: It's pretty simple really: You take the ball from me, charge at the gnome defence and try to throw the ball through the net using your ranged skill.
textByHash.56d182a6bf58a848847cda7155b6d4e3e6b8e471: It's a rough game but great fun. It's also great for improving agility.
textByHash.7355f5e3a6de046f111f7855d5f4f2b1d6711fdd: You may be right, we've seen humans die on this field.
textByHash.855cbb9a02050f19e34ab7c14895900dd2d85a6b: Hi, welcome to Gnomeball. It's pretty simple really: You take the ball from me, charge at the gnome defence and try to throw the ball through the net using your ranged skill.
textByHash.b16a77d2af2b2e4dee8cb3aeb17ae9ce2bb303e9: Right, you haven't finished quite yet.
textByHash.b8307b3e45c12f8ac73dde191b6ab0d3cd607cad: Ahh I see you have your own ball. We can't play with that; I'll give it back when you leave.
textByHash.be44b5fc99c4426458a7e31590f7fea323528683: Great stuff! There are few rules to Gnomeball, so it can get a bit rough.
textByHash.ce4794de32c76675602d5b0dda617c383c6ae442: It's a rough game but great fun. It's also great for improving agility. So do you fancy a game?
